name: abapgen
description: ABAP parser for Joern CPG generation

scripts.build: pkg parse-abap.js --targets node18-linux-x64 -o bin/astgen/abapgen-linux && pkg parse-abap.js --targets node18-linux-arm64 -o bin/astgen/abapgen-linux-arm && pkg parse-abap.js --targets node18-macos-x64 -o bin/astgen/abapgen-macos && pkg parse-abap.js --targets node18-macos-arm64 -o bin/astgen/abapgen-macos-arm && pkg parse-abap.js --targets node18-win-x64 -o bin/astgen/abapgen-win.exe
